subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast severed thyself from the world! Blessed art thou for having turned towards the Kingdom of thy glorious Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنقطعة عن الدنیا طوبی لک بما اقبلت الی ملکوت ربک المجید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
